title: Continued recognition of EU requirements, including CE marking, for placing products on the GB Market
body: "In May 2024, Parliament passed the Product Safety and Metrology etc (Amendment) Regulations 2024, which applies to 21 product regulations. This legislation applies to Great Britain and came into force on 1 October 2024.  The Product Safety Review public consultation ran from August to October 2023 and set out the then government’s ambitions to develop a product safety regime.  "
